languages.text:
"Так точно, Ваша Светлость"
{n}Иждриг кивает вам и начинает тихонько мычать знакомый мотив.{/n}
"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Izdrig nods to you and begins to softly hum a familiar melody.{/n}

"Так точно, Ваша Светлость"

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}Izdrig retreats into a patch of shadow, where he is most comfortable, almost disappearing within it.{/n}

languages.text:
「はい、御{mf|殿|殿}様。」
{n}イズドリックは影の奥に身を隠す。最も心地よい場所だ。ほとんど影の中に消えてしまう。{/n}
languages.original_text:
"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}Izdrig retreats into a patch of shadow, where he is most comfortable, almost disappearing within it.{/n}

languages.text: "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}İzdrig sana başını sallıyor ve tanıdık bir melodiyi mırıldanmaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Izdrig nods to you and begins to softly hum a familiar melody.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}İzdrig sana başını sallıyor ve tanıdık bir melodiyi mırıldanmaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “是，大人。”{n}伊兹德里格向你点了点头，轻声哼起一段熟悉的旋律。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Izdrig nods to you and begins to softly hum a familiar melody.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是，大人。”{n}伊兹德里格向你点了点头，轻声哼起一段熟悉的旋律。{/n}

languages.text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Izdrig nickt dir zu und beginnt leise, eine vertraute Melodie zu summen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Izdrig nods to you and begins to softly hum a familiar melody.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Izdrig nickt dir zu und beginnt leise, eine vertraute Melodie zu summen.{/n}

languages.text: « Très bien, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Izdrig vous adresse un hochement de tête et commence à fredonner une mélodie que vous reconnaissez.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Izdrig nods to you and begins to softly hum a familiar melody.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Très bien, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Izdrig vous adresse un hochement de tête et commence à fredonner une mélodie que vous reconnaissez.{/n}

languages.text: «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Izdrig se inclina ante ti y empieza a tararear en voz baja una melodía familiar.{/n}
